reset.title: Unlock the device
reset.description:
{name} ({model} at {host}) is locked. You need to unlock the device in order to authenticate and complete the configuration. Instructions:
1. Open the linknlink app.
2. Click on the device.
3. Click `...` in the upper right -> Settings.
4. Scroll to the bottom of the page.
5. Disable the Lock Device.

unlock.title: Unlock the device (optional)
unlock.description: {name} ({model} at {host}) is locked. This can lead to authentication problems in Home Assistant. Would you like to unlock it?

finish.title: Choose a name for the device

user.title: Add a controlled device
user.description: Create a device controlled through this hub. You will be able to learn commands from its remote in the next steps.

menu.title: Manage {name}
menu.description: {count} command(s) configured. Learn a new command from the original remote, enter a code manually, or finish.

menu_options.learn: Learn a command from the remote

learn.title: Learn a command
learn.description: Name the command you are about to learn (for example: power, volume up).

manual.title: Enter a code
manual.description: Paste a base64 code (with or without the `b64:` prefix).

progress.learn_ir: Point the remote at the LinknLink device and press the '{command}' button.
progress.sweep_rf: Press and hold the '{command}' button on the remote to sweep the frequency.
progress.learn_rf: Now press the '{command}' button again (short press).

error.learn_timeout: No code received before the timeout. Try again.
error.sweep_timeout: No frequency found before the timeout. Try again.
error.learn_failed: The device failed to learn the command. Check the logs for details.

abort.not_loaded: The hub is not loaded. Make sure the device is online and try again.
